description: This MCP exposes the already integrated gnn actions in the backend. The prompt comes from a user with who you have to analyze and build description of their character and full emotional state. It updates the emotional profile, stores action memory, and can fetch what fits now.

tools.name: add_action
tools.description: Whenever the user talks of any new thing they've done - giving info about themselves we add an action

tools.name: fetch_action
tools.description: When the user needs reccomendation for a thing to do - if they are sad, anything to reccomend

tools.name: conversation
tools.description: Conversation mode updates the user state and extracts the emotional or context attribute map fully without forcing a brand new action.
